_about: DEEP PHYSICAL SCIENCES corpus 2026-05-01. Deeper physics + chemistry + biology, beyond the surface domain crystals. Atomic + molecular structure, reaction dynamics, evolutionary mechanism, organism systems, cosmological history. Each through TIG operator alphabet.
atomic_physics_through_tig: Atom is operator-LATTICE of nucleus + electron orbitals; nucleus dense + small, electrons distributed in quantized shells.
Electron orbital is operator-PROBABILITY-LATTICE; not a path, a distribution where electron can be found.
Quantum number set (n, l, m, s) is operator-IDENTIFIER for orbital state; principal + angular + magnetic + spin.
Pauli exclusion: no two operator-FERMIONS occupy the same state; forces electron LATTICE-fill across orbitals.
Hund rule: operator-MAXIMIZE-MULTIPLICITY before pairing; degenerate orbitals fill singly first.
Aufbau is operator-LATTICE-fill-by-energy; lowest available orbital fills first as electrons are added.
Spectral line is operator-PHOTON-emission at electron transition; specific energy = h * nu = (E_final - E_initial).
Hydrogen spectrum (Lyman, Balmer, Paschen) is operator-LATTICE of allowed transitions; Rydberg formula gives wavelengths.
Fine structure is operator-LATTICE-splitting from spin-orbit coupling; small energy shifts within a level.
Hyperfine structure is operator-LATTICE-splitting from electron-nuclear-spin interaction; even smaller shifts (21cm hydrogen line).
molecular_dynamics_through_tig: Molecule is operator-LATTICE of bonded atoms; bonds are shared electron pairs, structure is energy minimum.
Bond order is operator-COUNT of shared electron pairs; single (1) double (2) triple (3) higher = stronger + shorter.
Hybridization is operator-MIX of atomic orbitals into molecular orbitals; sp3 (tetrahedral) sp2 (planar) sp (linear).
Molecular orbital theory: operator-LATTICE of bonding + antibonding orbitals from atomic orbital combinations.
VSEPR is operator-LATTICE-PREDICTION of geometry; electron pairs minimize repulsion, determines shape.
Polarity is operator-DIPOLE-moment from electronegativity-difference; H2O polar, CO2 not despite C=O polar bonds.
Reaction mechanism is operator-LATTICE-of-bond-changes; arrow pushing tracks electron flow at each step.
Activation energy is operator-BARRIER between reactant and product; rate exponential in (-Ea/RT) Arrhenius.
Catalyst is operator-PATH-PROVIDER with lower barrier; not consumed, accelerates without changing equilibrium.
Equilibrium constant K_eq is operator-RATIO at HARMONY; K = [products]/[reactants] at thermodynamic balance.
evolutionary_mechanism_through_tig: Evolution is operator-CHANGE in allele frequency over generations; not progress, not directional, just operator-flow.
Mutation is operator-RANDOM-VARIATION in genome; single nucleotide, insertion, deletion, duplication, inversion each variants.
Genetic drift is stochastic operator-FREQUENCY-CHANGE; strong in small populations, weak in large.
Natural selection is HARMONY-FILTER; organisms with operator-VARIANTS conferring fitness reproduce more.
Sexual selection is operator-MATE-CHOICE-FILTER; secondary sex characteristics evolve through partner preference.
Kin selection: operator-INCLUSIVE-fitness; behaviors that benefit relatives propagate via shared genes (Hamilton).
Speciation is operator-LATTICE-DIVERGENCE to reproductive isolation; allopatric (geographic) sympatric (ecological) parapatric (gradient).
Adaptive radiation is operator-PROGRESS-RAPID-DIVERSIFICATION when ecological space opens; Galapagos finches, Hawaiian honeycreepers.
Extinction is operator-LATTICE-COLLAPSE; lineage ends, ecological roles re-fill via radiation from survivors.
Coevolution is operator-LATTICE-COUPLED-CHANGE between interacting species; predator-prey, parasite-host, mutualists.
physiology_through_tig: Homeostasis is operator-BALANCE-maintained against perturbation; setpoint plus negative feedback equals BREATH-stable.
Allostasis is operator-PREDICTIVE-REGULATION; system anticipates demand and pre-adjusts (cortisol rises before waking).
Stress response is operator-HPA-axis-PROGRESS; hypothalamus -> pituitary -> adrenal -> cortisol; mobilizes resources.
Sleep is operator-LATTICE-CYCLE through stages (NREM 1-3 + REM); consolidates memory, clears metabolic waste.
Circadian rhythm is operator-24-HOUR-BREATH; suprachiasmatic nucleus entrains to light, regulates hormones + temperature.
Heart rate variability is operator-LATTICE of beat intervals; HARMONY-high HRV = healthy autonomic balance.
Vagal tone is operator-PARASYMPATHETIC-strength; via vagus nerve, the BREATH-down regulator after stress.
Inflammation is operator-IMMUNE-RESPONSE-LATTICE to insult; acute helpful, chronic CHAOS-COLLAPSE-system.
Insulin resistance is operator-CELL-DEAFNESS to insulin signal; precursor to type 2 diabetes, chronic low-grade.
Aging is operator-LATTICE-DRIFT toward COLLAPSE; telomere shortening + protein misfolding + mitochondrial decline + epigenetic changes.
biochemistry_deep_through_tig: Cellular respiration is operator-LATTICE-OF-OXIDATION; glycolysis (cytoplasm) + Krebs (mitochondria) + ETC (inner membrane).
ATP synthase is operator-MOLECULAR-MOTOR; proton gradient through F0 spins F1 catalytic head, makes ATP from ADP+Pi.
Photosynthesis light reactions: operator-PHOTON-DRIVEN-electron-transport; Z-scheme through PSII -> b6f -> PSI -> NADP+.
Calvin cycle: operator-CO2-FIXATION via RuBisCO; 3 turns per G3P, 6 turns per glucose-equivalent.
Protein folding is operator-COLLAPSE-driven by hydrophobic effect; nonpolar residues bury, polar surface, structure determined by sequence.
Enzyme catalysis is operator-LOWER-ACTIVATION-ENERGY via active site; substrate binds, transition state stabilized, product released.
Allosteric regulation: operator-DISTAL-BINDING affects active site; cooperative or anticooperative, gives switch-like behavior.
DNA replication is operator-SEMICONSERVATIVE-COPY; each strand template for new, helicase + primase + polymerase + ligase coordinate.
Transcription regulation is operator-LATTICE-CONTROL of expression; promoter + enhancer + transcription factor + chromatin state.
Signal transduction is operator-LATTICE-CASCADE from membrane to nucleus; receptor + GPCR or kinase + second messenger + effector.
cosmology_history_through_tig: Big Bang is operator-RESET-PROGRESS at t=0; cosmos begins from singularity, expands ever since.
Inflation is operator-EXPONENTIAL-PROGRESS at 10^-36 to 10^-32 seconds; smooths initial CHAOS, sets flatness + horizon.
Quark-gluon plasma at 10^-12 seconds; operator-LATTICE-of-fundamental-particles in thermal HARMONY before confinement.
Confinement at 10^-6 seconds; quarks operator-COLLAPSE into hadrons (protons, neutrons), strong force takes over.
Big Bang nucleosynthesis at 1-3 minutes; operator-FUSION makes H + He (75/25) plus traces of Li.
Recombination at 380000 years; electrons + protons operator-COLLAPSE into atoms, photons decouple, CMB released.
Dark ages from 380000 to 200 million years; no operator-LIGHT-SOURCES yet, primordial gas only.
First stars (Pop III) form ~200 million years; operator-COLLAPSE-of-massive-clouds, massive metal-free stars, short-lived.
Galaxy formation through hierarchical merging; operator-LATTICE-BUILDS up from small to large structures.
Dark energy dominance from ~5 Gyr ago; operator-ACCELERATING-EXPANSION begins, cosmos enters de Sitter-like phase.
Future heat death: operator-LATTICE-DISSIPATION over 10^100 years; black holes evaporate, photons redshift, eternal CHAOS-VOID.
directive: Physical sciences live at multiple scales: from operator-LATTICE-of-quarks to operator-LATTICE-of-galaxy-clusters.
TIG operator alphabet projects onto every scale uniformly; the same VOID/LATTICE/COUNTER/PROGRESS/etc apply.
Cross-scale unification is what makes physical-science thinking powerful; CK should read across scales naturally.
